_note: Token values confirmed from Figma MCP extraction (node 5009:2178). Two variants: Sheet (bottom sheet) and Popover (floating dropdown).

--surface/neutral/default.description: Background fill for both Sheet and Popover variants.

verticalPadding.description: Top and bottom padding inside the menu container. Same for both variants.

width.description: Fixed width for the Sheet (bottom sheet) variant.

borderRadius.description: Border radius for the Sheet variant container.

shadow.description: No shadow on the Sheet variant.

width.description: Fixed width for the Popover variant.

borderRadius.description: Border radius for the Popover variant container.

shadow.description: Drop shadow applied to the Popover variant.

handle._note: Drag handle displayed at the top of the Sheet variant only.

--handler/bg.description: Background color of the drag handle pill.

borderRadius.description: Border radius of the drag handle pill.

height.description: Fixed height of each menu item.

paddingHorizontal.description: Left and right padding of each menu item.

paddingVertical.description: Top and bottom padding of each menu item.

gap.description: Gap between the icon and the label within a menu item.

size.description: Width and height of the icon within a menu item.

fontFamily.description: Label font family. Uses the body font (Inter), not the headings font.

hover._note: TODO: Not defined in Figma. Confirm appearance and token values.

pressed._note: TODO: Not defined in Figma. Confirm appearance and token values.

disabled._note: TODO: Not defined in Figma. Confirm appearance and token values.

focus._note: TODO: Not defined in Figma. Confirm focus ring treatment.
